title: Astronaut Cat
summary: Photo-real ginger tabby in a custom astronaut suit, floating against a nebula.
prompt: A photo-realistic ginger tabby cat in a tiny custom-fit white astronaut suit with a glass-bubble helmet, floating in zero gravity. Inside the helmet the cat has a curious wide-eyed expression. Background: deep cosmic space with a swirl of pink and purple nebula, distant galaxies, scattered stars, planet Earth softly out of focus below. Cinematic NASA-photo lighting, hyper-detailed fur, square 1:1 composition.
